History:

Hine Tsukami was born in Saitama and had a perfect childhood, surrounded by the love and attention of her parents. Her mother, Fujina, was a housewife, while her father, Nagi, was a renowned civil engineering engineer. Despite her harmonious life, Hine showed much interest or emotion towards the world around her.

~--------X--------~

As a child, she tried to save an injured kitten, but the animal did not survive. Even though she did not feel sad, she realized that she had failed to save its life. Years later, when visiting her sick grandfather in the hospital, she became fascinated by the work of the medical team, which sparked her interest in nursing.
